title: SENTINEL APEX — Critical Whats in the container Analyzing vulnerabilities risks and protection w
id: 99a0d7ea-f7e9-5409-b750-951fa4c6fba9
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2021-4034 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: SUPPLYCHAIN
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2021-4034
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/21
modified: 2026/06/21
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2021-4034 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-21T05:30:35Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2021-4034", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2021-4034 Exploitation Attempt - SUPPLYCHAIN"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:3869627; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-21, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: Intelligence confirmed: Item is listed in CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities; CVSS score 7.8 (High); EPSS score 94.920 (very high exploitation probability)

confidence_factors.signal: Item is listed in CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities

items.title: F5 Patches Critical NGINX Vulnerabilities Enabling Unauthenticated Code Execution
items.description: F5 released emergency updates for critical NGINX flaws (CVE-2026-42530, CVE-2026-42055) that could enable unauthenticated code execution. F5 has issued out-of-band patches for multiple NGINX vulnerabilities, including two critical flaws, respectively tracked as CVE-2026-42530 and CVE-2026-42055 (CVSS 9.2). The bugs affect HTTP modules and can be exploited remotely without authentication to trigger memory corruption, potentially causing […]
items.recommended_sla_action: URGENT PATCH — Critical severity, deploy fix within 72 hours

items.title: Cisco fixed a critical ISE vulnerability that lets attackers to gain root access
items.description: Cisco addressed CVE-2026-20181, a critical ISE vulnerability that lets authenticated admins execute commands and gain root access. Cisco addressed a critical command execution vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-20181 (CVSS score of 9.1), affecting Identity Services Engine (ISE) and ISE-PIC. The flaw stems from improper validation of user-supplied input, allowing an authenticated attacker with administrative credentials to […]

title: SENTINEL APEX — Medium Royal Addons for Elementor Addons and Templates Kit for Elementor 171058 
id: eee3d081-0eea-5b86-8422-638c45969a44
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-6229 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-6229
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/21
modified: 2026/06/21
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: medium
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-6229 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-21T05:30:35Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-6229", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-6229 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:3162372; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-21, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.recommended_sla_action: SCHEDULED PATCH — Apply in next maintenance window

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Medium Security Vulnerability CVE-2026-11463
id: f0ec6d9a-056c-558d-86e1-caf65d1df4d0
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-11463 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: SQLI
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-11463
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/21
modified: 2026/06/21
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: webserver
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        cs-uri-query|contains:
            - "' OR 1=1"
            - "UNION SELECT"
            - "'; DROP TABLE"
            - "1=1--"
            - "benchmark("
            - "sleep("
            - "0x"
        sc-status|contains: '500'
    filter_legitimate:
        cs-uri-stem|startswith: '/api/search'
    condition: selection and not filter_legitimate
falsepositives:
    - Web application firewall test traffic
    - Vulnerability scanner activity
level: medium
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-11463 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-21T05:30:35Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-11463", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-11463 Exploitation Attempt - SQLI"; flow:established,to_server; content:"UNION SELECT"; nocase; content:"--"; distance:0; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:9786759; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-21, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
